cover.era_chip: 朝鮮 前期 · 五衛
cover.subtitle:
한양은 5위가 지키고,
지방은 진관이 막았다.
cover.imagePrompt: Early Joseon dynasty illustration, 15th century. ONE Korean royal guard (gapsa) in deep crimson and navy military uniform with leather armor and brimmed iron helmet, holding a long spear standing watch at a Gyeongbokgung palace gate. Stone wall with crenellations behind. Soft early-morning light, low fog. Composition: solitary disciplined figure, watchful stillness. Color: deep crimson + navy + ink-black + hanji beige. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 세조 진관 체제 완성. 지역 단위 향토 방위.
세조 5위 체제 정비. 의흥위 등 5개 위.
중종 군적수포제 시행. 군포 납부 공식화.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 진관(향토 방위)→제승방략(집결)→속오군(임란 후) 순서가 자주 출제된다. 5위는 중앙군, 진관은 지방군임을 혼동하지 말 것. 봉수 신호는 5단계로 표현됨을 기억.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized beacon-tower (bongsu) icon with a thin smoke wisp rising, simple ink-line. RIGHT: a small spear and helmet silhouette suggesting royal guard. Cream #F2EDE3 base + crimson #B91C1C accent + ink-black outline. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
